message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "<<analysis>>\nEditVariablesUI" as EditVariablesUI
participant "<<analysis>>\nUIController" as UIController
participant "<<analysis>>\nw: Workbook" as Workbook
participant "<<analysis>>\nlist: List<Variable>" as VariableList
participant "<<analysis>>\nVariable" as Variable

User -> EditVariablesUI : Edit variables
activate EditVariablesUI
EditVariablesUI -> UIController : w = getActiveWorkbook()
activate UIController
UIController -> Workbook : list = getVariables()
activate Workbook
deactivate Workbook
loop 
    VariableList -> EditVariablesUI : addItem(Variable)
end
deactivate UIController
deactivate EditVariablesUI

User -> EditVariablesUI : Selects a variable and changes the value
activate EditVariablesUI
EditVariablesUI -> Variable : setValue(newValue)
activate Variable
deactivate Variable
deactivate EditVariablesUI

@enduml
```
